name: MSI MPG Z890I EDGE TI WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Supports DDR5-8600+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel Killer E5000B 5Gb LAN - Intel Killer 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 (Z890IEDGTIWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG Z890I EDGE TI WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Supports
description: Compact Mini-ITX motherboard for Intel LGA1851 with DDR5 and Wi-Fi 7, ideal for small form factor builds.
